examples: Explanation Similar in size to other large, bright spiral galaxies, IC 342 is a mere 7 million light-years distant in the long-necked, northern constellation Camelopardalis.
She spotted Supernova 2010lt in the Camelopardalis constellation in a galaxy 240 light-years from Earth as she combed dozens of telescopic images of star fields last Sunday.
